techniques.evidence_quote: the attacker first accessed Timehop's cloud environment in December — using compromised admin credentials
apparently conducting reconnaissance for a few days that month, and again for another day in March and one in June
targeting an account that had not been protected by multifactor authentication
the keys that allow it to read and show users their social media content were compromised
personal data (names and emails) of 21 million users
millions of people's data had been breached

attack_chain.description: Attacker accessed Timehop's cloud computing environment using compromised admin credentials for an account that was not protected by multifactor authentication.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: the attacker first accessed Timehop's cloud environment in December — using compromised admin credentials

attack_chain.description: Attacker conducted reconnaissance of the cloud environment over several days in December, and additional single days in March and June.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: apparently conducting reconnaissance for a few days that month, and again for another day in March and one in June

evidence_chunks.quote: apparently conducting reconnaissance for a few days that month, and again for another day in March and one in June
apparently conducting reconnaissance for a few days that month, and again for another day in March and one in June

attack_chain.description: Attacker maintained persistent access to the environment via the compromised non-MFA cloud admin account across multiple months.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: targeting an account that had not been protected by multifactor authentication

evidence_chunks.quote: targeting an account that had not been protected by multifactor authentication
targeting an account that had not been protected by multifactor authentication

attack_chain.description: On July 4 during the US holiday, attacker launched the attack and accessed user data (names, emails, phone numbers) stored in the cloud environment.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: launch the attack on July 4, during a US holiday

evidence_chunks.quote: launch the attack on July 4, during a US holiday
launch the attack on July 4, during a US holiday

attack_chain.description: Attacker compromised social media OAuth tokens/keys that allowed Timehop to read users' social media content.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: the keys that allow it to read and show users their social media content were compromised

evidence_chunks.quote: the keys that allow it to read and show users their social media content were compromised
the keys that allow it to read and show users their social media content were compromised

attack_chain.description: Attacker exfiltrated the personal data of 21 million users before Timehop shut down the attack 2 hours 19 minutes later.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: not before millions of people's data had been breached

initial_access_vector: Compromised admin credentials for a cloud account that was not protected by multifactor authentication.
persistence_mechanism: Continued use of the valid compromised cloud admin credentials across several months (December, March, June, July) without MFA enforcement.
privilege_escalation: Not required — compromised credentials were already admin-level.
